steps.title: Seamless Fabrication
steps.text: We extrude gutter runs on-site at your {{city}} property to eliminate leak-prone seams.

seasonal_maintenance.headline: Low-maintenance drainage for {{state}} homes
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Clear your downspout elbows near {{parks}} before the first freeze. Ice expansion can burst your gutter seams.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Inspect your guard screens near {{neighborhood}}. High {{state}} humidity causes fine organic silt to clog micro-mesh over 5–10 years.
